title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Shree Cement Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Shree Cement Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Shree Cement Ventures Solutions is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Varanasi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Shree Cement Ventures Solutions:
Shree Cement Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shree Cement Ventures Solutions!
